content: WebSocket notification pitfalls in Next.js: (1) Multi-tab deduplication failure — each tab opens its own WS connection so the same toast fires in every tab; fix with per-notification unique IDs tracked in sessionStorage. (2) SSR window reference crash — instantiate WS client only in useEffect/client context. (3) Missed messages on reconnect — buffer N messages server-side, replay via sequence numbers on reconnect. (4) Serverless incompatibility — WS requires persistent Node process, not Vercel serverless functions. (5) Auth on WS — use private channel auth endpoint matching the same auth method as the API (cookie or bearer token).
